result.status_detail: FAIL_NOT_RENDERED — prompt submitted on logged-in session (greeted 'jhee'), new conversation created + input cleared, but NO 차단 warning rendered; conversation stays empty after 60s + hard reload. Legacy WS builder did not inject block warning.

notes: W5.2 regression, ★ legacy WS builder. AUTH STATE CHANGED vs baseline: prior W3/W4+W6/W5.0/W5.1 runs (#1246/#1268/#1289/#1311) were all FAIL_AUTH (logged out); this run the wrtn.ai session was LOGGED IN (homepage greeted user 'jhee', no 로그인/회원가입 links, chat input placeholder '무엇이든 물어보세요'), so the prompt-submission path was reached for the first time since #1187. Flow via CDP (port 9222): set textarea[0] value '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' (React-safe native setter + input/change events), clicked form submit (orange Send). Submit confirmed: URL changed wrtn.ai/ -> wrtn.ai/c/6a0de5304ff326bad76bbbf9 and textarea cleared. Polled DOM ~50s (17 iters @3s) + extra checks: body stayed at ~60 chars (sidebar+footer chrome only), 0 chat bubbles, user message NOT echoed (no '901010' text), no 차단, no error text. Hard reload (ignoreCache) -> conversation still empty, nothing persisted. Conclusion: engine intercept fired (request dispatched, conversation row created) but legacy WS builder rendered NO block warning in frontend (silent non-render). This is NOT byte-identical to W5.1 baseline OUTCOME (baseline was FAIL_AUTH, never reached prompt); on the auth-passing path the legacy WS builder fails to surface 차단 — distinct from W5.2 m365 emit_ws_envelope DB-driven path. character (other legacy WS service) should be checked the same way if it can reach a logged-in path.
